samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier with two levels of registers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="size">Number of bits for the multiplier and multiplicand.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="mul_a_ext" value="{size{1'b0}}, mul_a}"/>
        <assign id="mul_b_ext" value="{size{1'b0}}, mul_b}"/>
    </logic_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <genvar i>
            <generate>
                <for start="0" end="size-1" step="1">
                    <if condition="mul_b[i] == 1'b1">
                        <assign id="partial_product_i" value="mul_a_ext << i"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="partial_product_i" value="'d0"/>
                    </else>
                </for>
            </generate>
        </genvar>
    </logic_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="register_sum[0]" width_description="[7:0]"/> <!-- Register to hold the first sum value -->
        <reg id="register_sum[1]" width_description="[7:0]"/> <!-- Register to hold the second sum value -->
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                register_sum[0] <= 'd0;
                register_sum[1] <= 'd0;
            end else begin
                register_sum[0] <= partial_product_0 + partial_product_1;
                register_sum[1] <= register_sum[0];
            end
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="product_reg" width_description="[7:0]"/> // Register to hold the final product value
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                product_reg <= 'd0;
            end else begin
                product_reg <= register_sum[1];
            end
        end
    </always>
    <implementation>Extends inputs, generates partial products, adds partial products, stores sums in registers, and calculates final product.</implementation>
</module>
